name: Chippewa Falls Buchanan Park
description: Come play pickleball at Chippewa Falls Buchanan Park in Chippewa Falls, WI! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Chippewa Valley Family YMCA
description: Chippewa Valley Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chippewa Falls, WI. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the court. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Cornell High School
description: Permanent pickleball lines on tennis courts with permanent tennis nets.

name: Lafayette Pickleball Courts
description: Lafayette Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chippewa Falls, WI. There are 5 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Lake Hallie Pickleball at Gower Park
description: Lake Hallie Pickleball at Gower Park is a place to play pickleball in Lake Hallie, WI. There are 18 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include restrooms.
open_play_schedule: From July 29 through September 6, the CVPC will be offering Ladder Leagues on 6-7 of the courts on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday nights, 5:30-9:00 pm, and Wednesday mornings, 8:00-11:00 am. Remaining Courts will be available for Open Play.

name: Marshall Park-Senn Courts
description: 2 Additional courts striped on tennis court. Using these requires portable nets.
